name: vasana-system
description: A working proof of concept for catching the same structure in places that have nothing to do with each other — and in your own working process: notice such a regularity, capture it, and test each for a real shared mechanism, not surface resemblance. Today it's a growing, hand-kept list of specific observations that resurface when the shape shows up again, each accumulating a count of the times it has recurred. The self-organizing learner the system is built toward is the genuine direction, not yet the state — an early, already-useful step toward it. Memory for forms, not just facts; two local MCP servers (relational-memory + a usage-weighted knowledge graph, experimental). The term "vasana" is grounded in the plugin's axioms.
